infrastructure_stack: Docker Compose (Node.js, Postgres with pgvector, RabbitMQ, Redis, LocalStack for S3/SES)
service_dependencies: Stripe API (Test Mode), OpenAI API (Mocked or Dev Key)

infrastructure_stack: GitHub Actions Runners / AWS CodeBuild (Testcontainers for DB/MQ)
service_dependencies: All internal services mocked or containerized; External APIs mocked (Stripe/AWS)
cost_optimization: Spot instances for runners; aggressive timeout limits

data_refresh_frequency: Weekly (Sanitized Prod Dump or Synthetic Data)
infrastructure_stack: AWS EKS (1 Control Plane, 2 Worker Nodes), RDS (db.t3.medium + pgvector), ElastiCache, Amazon MQ
service_dependencies: Stripe Sandbox, AWS SES Sandbox, OpenAI API (Dev Tier)
cost_optimization: Spot Instances for workers; Scale down to 0 at night/weekends

infrastructure_stack: AWS EKS (Auto-scaling enabled), RDS (Production-tier specs for test duration)
service_dependencies: Stripe Mock Server (to avoid rate limits), Mocked AI Service (to save costs)
monitoring_tools: k6 Cloud, CloudWatch Insights, Container Insights
cost_optimization: Environment provisioned only during tests; Destroyed immediately after

infrastructure_stack: AWS EKS (Multi-AZ), RDS (Multi-AZ + Read Replicas), S3 (Versioning/Locking), WAF
service_dependencies: Stripe Live, AWS SES Production, OpenAI API Enterprise
access_control: Privileged Access Management (PAM); Zero Trust Network Access
backup_strategy: Continuous WAL Archiving + Daily Snapshots (Retention 30 days)
cost_optimization: Reserved Instances for baseline; Savings Plans; Auto-scaling policies
